title: Conquest Reforged Resource Pack
description: Resourcepack for use with the Conquest Reforged mod for the fullest and best experience.
body:
[![conquestheader](https://i.imgur.com/zcirlvD.png)](https://conquestreforged.com) [![discordimg](https://img.shields.io/discord/164052674637987840?color=1b1b1b&label=Discord&logo=Discord&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/ZagrZvn)[![twitterlink](https://img.shields.io/twitter/follow/conreforged?color=1b1b1b&label=Follow%20@ConReforged&logo=twitter&style=for-the-badge)](https://twitter.com/ConReforged)[![weblinkimg](https://img.shields.io/badge/Website-ConquestReforged.com-1b1b1b?style=for-the-badge)](https://conquestreforged.com)

This is NOT a standalone resourcepack!

The pack is meant to be used together with the **Conquest Reforged MOD** to supply connected textures for the full visual experience when used with **Optifine[Forge] or Continuity[Fabric]** and the rest of the Conquest Reforged mod-pack.

Features

* Connected textures * Custom sky * Custom biome colors * GUI overhaul * additional sounds * Total overhaul of Minecraft aesthetic
